div.t-att-class: { 'product-qty-left-badge': true, 'negative-stock': props.product.qty_available < 0, 'zero-stock': props.product.qty_available === 0, 'medium-stock': props.product.qty_available > 0 && props.product.qty_available <= 10, 'high-stock': props.product.qty_available > 10 }
div.t-att-title: props.product.qty_available <= 0 ? 'Attention ! Stock nul ou négatif' : 'Stock disponible'
